name: NumberFormatter
description: Format number with thousands/decimal separators and suffix/prefix
searchText: numberformatter format number with thousands/decimal separators and suffix/prefix @mantine/core /core/number-formatter allownegative decimalscale decimalseparator fixeddecimalscale prefix suffix thousandseparator thousandsgroupstyle value

props.name: allowNegative
props.description: If set, negative values are allowed

props.name: decimalScale
props.description: Limits the number of digits that are displayed after the decimal point

props.name: decimalSeparator
props.description: Character used as a decimal separator, '.' by default

props.name: fixedDecimalScale
props.description: If set, zeros are added after decimalSeparator to match given decimalScale.

props.name: thousandSeparator
props.description: A character used to separate thousands
